title: cephaelis laui
intro: Cephaelis laui, also known as the Lau'i plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, where its roots are valued for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The Lau'i plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its roots can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, such as decoctions or infusions.
